chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 279 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1370/2025 2. For orders on CMA No.1371/2025 3. For orders on CMA No.1372/2025 4. For hearing of main case 22.01.2025 Mr. Waseem Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner The petitioner is aggrieved of the statutory requirement of deposit in matters of appeal per the Foreign Exchange Regulation Act, 1947, hence, this petition. Prima facie this matter is squarely covered by the judgment of a Division Bench of this Court in Pak Terry Mills1; as amplified by a subsequent judgment of another Division Bench of this Court in Zilay Nawab2. The aforesaid edicts are binding upon this Court. Therefore, in mutatis mutandis application of the reasoning and rationale illumined in the judgments cited supra, this petition is found to be misconceived and devoid of merit; hence, hereby dismissed, along with pending applications, in limine. Judge Judge Amjad 1 Per Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui J in judgment dated 21.06.2024 rendered in Pak Terry Mills Pvt. Ltd. vs. Federation of Pakistan & Others (CP D 3066 of 2024). 2 Per Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar J in judgment dated 21.08.2024 rendered in Saiyid Zilay A Nawab Rizvi. vs. State Bank of Pakistan & Others (CP D 3968 of 2024).
